# Pull Request

## Summary

What changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Content (portfolio/docs)
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Docs / governance

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format` clean
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` clean
- [ ] `npm test` passing
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Works in **light and dark** themes
- [ ] Responsive; no horizontal overflow
- [ ] Semantic color tokens only (no `white`/`zinc` literals)
- [ ] `/docs` updated to match (docs are the source of truth)
- [ ] `docs/governance/*` updated if quality/scope changed

## Screenshots (UI changes)

Light and dark, mobile and desktop where relevant.

## Notes / risks

Anything reviewers should know; rollback plan.
